Container.Name: iPodSync
Container.Overview: Direct iPod Classic sync for Unraid. Transcodes FLAC to ALAC and writes the iTunesDB straight to a USB-connected iPod (libgpod/gpod-utils), with incremental updates and a web UI. Build the image locally from the project Dockerfile before adding this container.
Container.Description: Direct iPod Classic sync: FLAC->ALAC transcode + iTunesDB write over USB, incremental, web UI. NOTE: the iPod is auto-detected by FAT label (default IPOD) — no device node to configure. Disable Unassigned Devices automount for the iPod so this container is the sole owner. Build the image locally (docker build -t ipodsync:local .) before applying.

Config.Name: iPod label
Config.Description: FAT label used to auto-detect the iPod (mounts it at /ipod). Disable Unassigned Devices automount for the iPod so the container is the sole owner.
